sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-07-31 17:56
- Distance: 9.1 km
- Moving time: 52:54
- Elapsed time: 54:26
- Elevation gain: 149.2 m
- Average heart rate: 160.9 bpm
- Max heart rate: 176 bpm
- Average watts: 220.9 W
- Average speed: 10.3 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `160.3 bpm`, ranging from `147.6` to `167.8 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `154.6 bpm` and second-half average HR was `166.1 bpm` (+11.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `165.8 spm`, with a working range of `151.4` to `171.8 spm` after excluding `2` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `164.7 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `165.5 spm` (+0.8 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:48 /km` across `9.118 km` in `52:54` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:35 /km` and second-half pace was `6:01 /km` (+26 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `160.9 bpm` average and `176 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `154.9 bpm` in the first half and `166.2 bpm` in the second (+11.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `52:54` out of `54:26` elapsed (97.2%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `5` stop segments and `0.8%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `165.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.0 m` and `71.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `55.8 m` in the first half and `109.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
